title: AIR MCP Servers Configuration
description: Configuration file defining MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers. Follows the mcp.json open standard — a flat map of server names to fully-resolved connection configurations.

propertyNames.description: Server name (identifier key). Must be alphanumeric with hyphens, underscores, or brackets allowed.

OAuthConfiguration.description: OAuth configuration for remote servers using OAuth authorization.

clientId.description: OAuth client ID. If omitted, the client uses Dynamic Client Registration (DCR) or discovery.

scopes.description: OAuth scopes to request in the authorization request. Passed as the scope parameter (RFC 6749 §3.3).

redirectUri.description: Redirect URI for the OAuth callback. For CLI/desktop clients this is typically http://localhost:{port}/callback (RFC 8252).

ServerConfiguration.description: Configuration for a single MCP server.

title.description: Human-readable display name for the server.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the server provides.

type.description: Transport type. 'stdio' for local process servers, 'sse' for Server-Sent Events, 'streamable-http' for HTTP streaming.

command.description: Executable command to run for stdio servers. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.

args.description: Command-line arguments for stdio servers. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.

env.description: Environment variables for the server process. Values support ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.

url.description: Endpoint URL for sse or streamable-http servers. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.

headers.description: HTTP headers for remote servers. Values support ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.
